QueryRoutingRules.routeTableId: Route table ID. One of this parameter or vpcId is required.
QueryRoutingRules.vpcId: VPC ID. One of this parameter or routeTableId is required.
QueryRoutingRules.marker: Starting position for paginated list queries, a system-generated string.
QueryRoutingRules.maxKeys: Maximum number of entries per page, up to 1000. Default is 1000.
